title: AURORA, Official Merchandise, 60349, The Gruffalo's Mouse, 6In, Soft Toy, Brown & White, 5.11 x 2.75 x 7.08 centimeters
features: From the best-selling children's book The Gruffalo by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable The Gruffalo's Mouse Soft Toy, perfect present for children.
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Gruffalo Mouse The Mouse 6" plush is inspired by the children's book by Julia Donaldson - The Gruffalo, illustrated by Alex Scheffler. Made from fine plush materials, now you can have your very own soft and cuddly Gruffalo Buddie to love and take everywhere with you Suitable from birth
